item.title: An options trade in materials group for when valuations get too rich
item.description: Stocks don't go up in a straight line. They can be oversold or a bit extended in the short-term. Such may be the case right now in materials, Mike Kho...

item.title: Citizens turns bullish on this fintech stock, says risk-reward has improved after tech sell-off
item.description: Citizens Bank's $30 price target implies that shares of SoFi Technologies could rally 44% from here.

item.title: D.A. Davidson gets bullish on Open AI and the stocks in its orbit
item.description: D.A. Davidson upgraded Oracle to a buy rating from neutral, further reflecting the firm's optimism regarding OpenAI.

item.title: Melius Research downgrades Microsoft as its free cash flow comes under pressure
item.description: Melius Research's $430 price target implies that shares of Microsoft coul still add 7% from here.

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these stocks for long-term growth potential
item.description: In recent earnings, some companies proved their ability to capitalize on solid growth opportunities offered by the ongoing AI boom through strong exec...
